settings.heading: Why Sacred Colostrum Works
settings.subtext: Every scoop delivers nature's most complete nutritional matrix — bioactives that work synergistically to transform your health.

settings.title: What bioactives are in colostrum?
settings.content: Sacred Colostrum contains over 400 bioactives including IGF-1, TGF-β, lactoferrin, proline-rich polypeptides, and all four immunoglobulin classes.

settings.title: How is it processed?
settings.content: We use a gentle low-heat process to preserve the delicate bioactives — never ultra-pasteurized.

settings.title: Is it third-party tested?
settings.content: Yes. Every batch is independently tested for potency, purity, and safety before it reaches you.

settings.title: Where is it sourced?
settings.content: Our colostrum is ethically sourced from pasture-raised cows in New Zealand — only surplus colostrum collected after calves are fully fed.

settings.heading: The Sacred Difference
settings.subtext: Not all colostrum is created equal. Here's why Sacred Colostrum stands apart.

settings.question: What is bovine colostrum?
settings.answer: Bovine colostrum is the first milk produced by cows in the first 24–72 hours after birth. It's packed with growth factors, immunoglobulins, and over 400 bioactives.

settings.question: How do I take Sacred Colostrum?
settings.answer: Mix one scoop (5g) into water, smoothies, or your favourite beverage daily. For best results, take on an empty stomach in the morning.

settings.question: How long before I see results?
settings.answer: Many customers notice improved energy and digestion within 2–4 weeks. We recommend at least 3 months of consistent use for full benefits.

settings.question: Is it safe for lactose intolerant people?
settings.answer: Colostrum contains very low levels of lactose compared to regular milk. Many lactose-sensitive individuals tolerate it well, but we recommend consulting your doctor.

settings.question: What is your money-back guarantee?
settings.answer: We offer a full 60-day money-back guarantee. If you're not satisfied for any reason, contact us for a complete refund — no questions asked.

settings.question: Is colostrum ethical?
settings.answer: Yes. We only collect surplus colostrum after calves have been fully fed. Our farmers follow strict animal welfare standards in New Zealand.
